overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player traverses sidewalks, crosses under an elevated highway, passes through a purple-lit covered walkway, and ascends stairs to an upper plaza. The environment features wet reflective streets, towering buildings with digital billboards, and sparse pedestrian activity.

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a yellow food stall and tall buildings with neon signage

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction past the camera

tall concrete building with large gold AQUEUS signage

rain-slicked multi-lane road with neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow futuristic city sidewalk at night. The camera walks past a yellow food stall and a pedestrian, with the tall AQUEUS building dominating the left side. Neon billboards and blue street lamps illuminate the wet street to the right, creating colorful reflections on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath elevated highway with advertising billboards

crossing the street beneath the overpass while vehicles pass on the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street beneath the elevated highway overpass, navigating around barriers

large illuminated advertising murals on the concrete wall
red traffic signal mounted on blue pole

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, transitioning from the open sidewalk to a semi-covered concrete environment. Large illuminated billboards line the right wall while the camera crosses the wet asphalt street, passing blue street lamps and traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered pedestrian walkway with intense purple neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering brightly lit covered corridor with intense purple and white ceiling lights
exiting the covered walkway back to open street environment

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic enclosed corridor with glowing purple neon ceiling strips

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with bright purple neon ceiling strips and clean white tiled walls
futuristic black vending machine with blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a futuristic covered walkway illuminated by intense purple and white neon ceiling lights. The environment is clean and enclosed with white tiles, featuring a black vending machine on the left. The segment ends as the camera exits back to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown intersection with wet streets and modern architecture

events.description: exiting covered walkway to open street with view of tall buildings and palm trees
approaching and beginning to ascend wide concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street and approaching a wide concrete staircase leading to an upper plaza

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading to upper pedestrian level
palm tree in large concrete planter
building facade with bright blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera exits to an open downtown intersection with wet streets reflecting neon lights. A palm tree sits in a planter on the left while modern buildings with illuminated windows rise on the right. The camera crosses the street and approaches a wide concrete staircase, following a pedestrian ascending to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with food vendors and gathering space

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper plaza area
encountering a group of pedestrians gathered near a food stall

agents.ego_description: ascending the stairs and entering an upper level plaza with pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near a blue neon food stall

entered.detail: food stall with bright blue neon lighting and metal counter
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs into an elevated plaza area sheltered by building overhangs. A food stall with bright blue neon lighting occupies the left side, while pedestrians gather and converse in the open concrete space. An elevated walkway connects the buildings overhead, creating a semi-enclosed urban courtyard atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a narrow street level up into an elevated urban plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a yellow food stall and the towering AQUEUS building, where blue street lamps cast colorful reflections across the pavement. As the camera moves forward, the open air gives way to the heavy concrete of a massive highway overpass before transitioning into a clean, enclosed walkway bathed in intense purple and white neon light. The scene then opens back onto a downtown intersection with reflective streets and palm trees, leading the camera across the asphalt toward a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs into a sheltered upper plaza, passing a blue-lit food stall to enter a semi-enclosed courtyard where pedestrians gather beneath overhead walkways.
